title: Cisco VoIP - Misc - Installing a Phone with a PC
body: Plug the Ethernet cable (cord 1) into the port on the back of the phone that has the computer symbol Unplug the Ethernet cable (cord 2) that goes into the computer and replace it with the other end of cord 1 Plug cord 2 into the port on the back of the phone with the 3 boxes Connect the power cord to the back of the phone
